data.title: Add desync guard to design-wireframe SKILL.md
data.description:
## Description

Add a desync guard to `plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md` that clears design:approved when wireframe.svg is regenerated.

### Implementation
Insert before Step 13 (SVG generation) in the Full Track:
1. Check if the story has design:approved tag (via ticket show, check tags array)
2. If design:approved is present:
   a. Source figma-tags.conf for tag constants
   b. Remove TAG_APPROVED from tags via read-modify-write with ticket edit
   c. Add ticket comment warning: "⚠️ wireframe.svg is being regenerated. The previous Figma revision image (figma-revision.png) may no longer match the new manifest. Re-import the updated SVG into Figma and export a new revision PNG, then re-run the approval command."
   d. Log: "Desync guard: cleared design:approved tag — wireframe being regenerated"

### Files to modify
- Edit: `plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md`

## TDD Requirement
After modification, the RED eval test case from T3 must PASS (GREEN).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md contains desync guard checking design:approved before SVG generation
  Verify: grep -q 'design:approved\|TAG_APPROVED\|desync' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references figma-tags.conf in desync guard
  Verify: grep -q 'figma-tags.conf' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md includes warning comment text about regeneration
  Verify: grep -q 'regenerat\|no longer match' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md
